title: eryngium alternatum
intro: Eryngium alternatum, also known as two-flowered eryngo, is a perennial plant species in the family Apiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eryngium alternatum include the treatment of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, with some studies also suggesting its potential in reducing pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using it as a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
